metadata.description: Specsmith TDD marketplace containing the specsmith-tdd plugin for TDD-first, persistent, resumable AI coding specs.

plugins.name: specsmith-tdd
plugins.description: TDD-first spec management for AI coding workflows. Every task starts with a failing test, no production code without red tests. Specs enforce test-per-phase structure, testcontainers for real services, and strict red-green-refactor cycles.
